briefdescription.para: This function does a minimal test on the IO Module device and driver as a design example.

detaileddescription.para: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the IO Module component. It initializes the Programmable Interval Timers and then sets it up in compare mode with auto reload such that a periodic interrupt is generated.
This function uses interrupt driven mode of the IO Module.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the IO Module driver Instance
is the XPAR_<IOModule_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the Test is successful, otherwise XST_FAILURE
This function contains an infinite loop such that if interrupts are not working it may never return.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the IO module.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context such that the amount of processing performed should be minimized. It is called when an interrupt occurs if interrupts are enabled.
This handler provides an example of how to handle Programmable Interval Timer interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function
is the number of the interrupt this handler is associated with.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes and enables exception handling for interrupts in the processor.

parameterdescription.para: is the reference to the IO Module instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the interrupts for the IO Module.

parameterdescription.para: is a reference to the IO Module driver Instance.

briefdescription.para: This is the main function for the IO Module example.

detaileddescription.para: This function is not included if the example is generated from the TestAppGen test tool.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS to indicate success, otherwise XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a design example using the IO Module driver (XIOModule) and hardware device using interrupt mode.This example tests the internal interrupts in the IO Module.

detaileddescription.para: This file can be used as a standalone example or by the TestAppGen utility to include a test of IOModule interrupts.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a sa 07/15/11 First release 2.4 ms 01/23/17 Added xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028. 2.16 ml 12/07/23 Make TimerExpired as a static variable. 2.19 ml 04/18/25 Added support for system device-tree flow.
